title: Symbol call graph goldset and promotion benchmark
goal: Measure precision, unresolved honesty, context compression and coding-agent task quality before any default promotion.

acceptance.assertion: A fixed multilingual-aware but Python-scored goldset covers direct calls, aliases, recursion, methods, shadowing, callbacks, decorators, defaults, dynamic dispatch and negative cases.
The evaluation reports S1 precision, recall, false-positive classes, unresolved share, bytes, build time, context paths, tool calls and agent task outcomes.
Default promotion remains false unless target recall is equal or better, S1 precision meets the registered threshold and no central task category regresses.

metadata.source_request: User requested all Symbol Call Graph work to be registered and implemented.

lease_scope_migration.rationale: The Lenskit benchmark reads only its exact Bureau task, shared initiative truth and promotion plan; benchmark effects remain in Lenskit.
does_not_establish: safe mutation of terminal historical tasks

metadata.outcome: RepoGround now has a fixed Python call-graph quality goldset, separate precision, recall, honesty, compression and navigation-task metrics, a fail-closed promotion gate, and commit-bound CI evidence while default promotion remains false.
validation: All eight final-head GitHub workflow groups passed: Python Call Graph Goldset, test-suite, lint, CodeQL, contracts-validate, task-index, ai-context guard and Doc-Freshness.
The dedicated benchmark slice passed 40 focused tests, Ruff, JSON validation and structural diff checks.
The repository-wide Pytest, Playwright, WebUI and release-candidate jobs passed on exact head 1761b9e144c023092bdedca4879a799f888ef618.
The fixed goldset reports S1 precision 1.0, target recall 1.0, zero false positives and zero false negatives across 13 scored categories.
Deterministic navigation tasks preserve recall while reducing aggregate context paths from 11 to 5 and tool calls from 9 to 3.
The exact CI-generated PR diff contains nine files, 1425 additions, zero deletions and SHA-256 27f4c356a78e515218527ff9c8702c7dc614f317721242cce7a4aca7ea35e736.
Head-bound self-review passed with no unresolved review threads and no producer or default-route mutation.

verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t024-goldset: A fixed Python-scored goldset covers all registered call categories, includes German Unicode identifier and UTF-8 handling, and preserves dynamic, ambiguous and shadowed cases as explicit non-S1 evidence.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t024-metrics: The reviewable JSON report separates S1 precision, target recall, false-positive classes, unresolved share, serialized bytes, build time, context paths, tool calls and deterministic navigation-task outcomes.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t024-promotion: All registered thresholds pass on the fixed evidence, but the report sets only eligible_for_review=true and keeps default_promoted=false with Bureau as decision authority.
